# kCTFontManagerErrorDomain | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Text ](/documentation/coretext)

- [ kCTFontManagerErrorDomain ](/documentation/coretext/kctfontmanagererrordomain)

-  kCTFontManagerErrorDomain 

Global Variable# kCTFontManagerErrorDomain

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.6+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontManagerErrorDomain: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/kctfontmanagererrordomain#Discussion)

CFError objects with this domain have error codes corresponding to one of the `CTFontManagerError` errors listed in `Font Registration Errors` and [`CTFontManagerError`](/documentation/coretext/ctfontmanagererror).
